sys_script_fix.description:
DFCT0012327 - 2023-01-18 - RAJ - User not able to set primary assignee on subtask due to empty "privacy level" after upgrade on older task when upgraded Additonal Note on this fix, had to change query as notNullQuery did not work for the privacy field.
In 2.8, a privacy field was added to tasks and task trees. Customers noticed that when this field is empty users have trouble changing the Primary Assignee This script finds all empty privacy fields and sets them to open.
Run this script to set empty Privacy fields on task and task tree records to open
sys_script_fix.name: 2.8.401 - Default Privacy fields to open
